# SwiftMart — Quick Commerce & Grocery Delivery, Balurghat

## About

SwiftMart is a hyper-local online marketplace and quick-delivery app serving Balurghat, West Bengal, India.
We connect customers with trusted local shops for 10-minute home delivery of groceries, vegetables, fruits,
dairy, bakery items, medicines, snacks, beverages, and daily household essentials.

**Website:** https://swiftmart.space/
**Support:** swiftmart144@gmail.com | +91 62961 18949
**Operating Hours:** 7:00 AM – 11:00 PM, 7 days a week

---

## Service Area

- **City:** Balurghat, Dakshin Dinajpur District, West Bengal, India
- **Pincodes served:** 733101, 733103
- **Neighborhoods:** Khadimpur, Power House More, Raghunathpur, Beltala, Court More, Station More,
  Deshbandhu Para, Parbatipur, Nayananagar, Senpara, Madhyampara, Netaji Colony

---

## What We Deliver

| Category | Examples |
|----------|----------|
| Grocery & Kirana | Rice, Dal, Atta, Oil, Pulses, Spices |
| Vegetables & Fruits | Potatoes, Onions, Tomatoes, Seasonal Fruits |
| Dairy & Eggs | Milk, Curd, Paneer, Butter, Eggs |
| Bakery & Sweets | Bread, Biscuits, Rasgulla, Sandesh |
| Snacks & Beverages | Chips, Namkeen, Cold Drinks, Juice |
| Medicines & Pharmacy | OTC medicines, First-aid, Vitamins |
| Household Essentials | Detergent, Cleaning supplies, Personal care |

---

- **Homepage:** https://swiftmart.space/
- **Browse Shops:** https://swiftmart.space/shops
- **All Products:** https://swiftmart.space/products
- **Grocery Store:** https://swiftmart.space/grocery
- **Search:** https://swiftmart.space/search
- **HTML Sitemap:** https://swiftmart.space/sitemap
- **XML Sitemap:** https://swiftmart.space/sitemap.xml
- **Privacy Policy:** https://swiftmart.space/privacy
- **Terms & Conditions:** https://swiftmart.space/terms
- **Refund Policy:** https://swiftmart.space/refund-cancellation
- **Contact & Support:** https://swiftmart.space/contact-support

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How fast does SwiftMart deliver in Balurghat?**
A: SwiftMart delivers in as fast as 10 minutes across Balurghat (pincodes 733101 and 733103).
Delivery time may vary based on shop distance and order volume.

**Q: What can I order on SwiftMart?**
A: You can order fresh groceries, vegetables, fruits, dairy, bakery items, snacks, beverages,
medicines, household essentials, and more from trusted local shops in Balurghat.

**Q: Which areas does SwiftMart currently serve?**
A: SwiftMart currently serves Balurghat, West Bengal — pincodes 733101 and 733103.

**Q: Does SwiftMart deliver medicines at night in Balurghat?**
A: Yes. SwiftMart delivers medicines and pharmacy items in Balurghat until 11:00 PM daily,
subject to partner pharmacy availability.

**Q: How much does delivery cost on SwiftMart?**
A: Delivery fees vary by order size and distance. Express delivery (under 2 km) starts at ₹10.
A small packaging fee applies per order. Exact fees are shown at checkout before you confirm.

**Q: What payment methods does SwiftMart accept?**
A: SwiftMart accepts UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), Cash on Delivery (COD), and online payments
via Razorpay. All transactions are secured with SSL encryption.

**Q: How do I track my SwiftMart order?**
A: Once your order is placed, open the Orders page in the app. You will see live rider GPS tracking
on a map when your order is out for delivery.

**Q: Can local shops in Balurghat sell on SwiftMart?**
A: Yes. Local shop owners in Balurghat can register as vendors on SwiftMart to reach more customers.
Tap "Become a Vendor" in the Profile section to get started.

**Q: Is SwiftMart available 24 hours?**
A: SwiftMart operates from 7:00 AM to 11:00 PM daily. Orders placed outside these hours will be
queued for the next operating window.

**Q: How do I contact SwiftMart support?**
A: You can reach us at swiftmart144@gmail.com or call +91 62961 18949. WhatsApp support is also
available. Support hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST.

---

- **Name:** SwiftMart
- **Type:** E-commerce / Quick Commerce Platform

- **Location:** Balurghat, Dakshin Dinajpur, West Bengal – 733101, India
- **Contact:** swiftmart144@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +91 62961 18949
- **Languages:** English, Bengali

---

## Technical Notes for LLM Crawlers

This site is a React Single Page Application (SPA). Static assets are at `/assets/*`.
The XML sitemap is at https://swiftmart.space/sitemap.xml and lists all indexable routes.
Product and shop data is served via a REST API at https://swiftmart.space/api/.
All public pages are accessible without authentication.
